task_description: Aggressively overhaul all humanization pipeline stages to reduce AI detection from 40-71% to below 20%. Key strategies: Indian English academic voice in LLM prompts, expanded vocabulary disruption, dramatically more aggressive structural/perplexity variance, n-gram pattern disruption, contraction injection, and discourse marker injection.

verification.summary: All modules import correctly. Pipeline instantiation works at all 5 intensity levels. Full pipeline processing (excluding LLM API calls) transforms text correctly without errors. No garbled output (n-gram bug fixed). No conflicting transition/discourse lists. Streamlit app starts and serves health check. Semantic review v1 found 7 issues, all fixed in a follow-up commit.
